title: xanthophyllum discolor
intro: Xanthophyllum discolor, also known as the Discolor Xanthophyllum, is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum discolor include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction by boiling its roots and leaves in water, and it can also be made into a tea or infused oil for medicinal purposes.
